tasks.subject: Task 0: Supabase 스키마 + 환경 설정
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DB 테이블, pgvector 익스텐션, Storage 버킷 생성 및 환경변수 구성

**Files:**
- Create: `supabase/migrations/001_init.sql`
- Create: `.env.local.example`
- Create: `src/lib/supabase/client.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/supabase/types.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] pgvector 익스텐션 활성화
- [ ] templates, projects, pages 테이블 생성
- [ ] screenshots 버킷 존재
- [ ] supabase client가 server/client 양쪽에서 import 가능

**Verify:** `npx supabase db reset` → 에러 없이 완료

```json:metadata
{"files": ["supabase/migrations/001_init.sql", "src/lib/supabase/client.ts", "src/lib/supabase/types.ts", ".env.local.example"], "verifyCommand": "npx supabase db reset", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pgvector enabled", "tables created", "screenshots bucket exists", "client importable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: 프로젝트 초기화 + 공통 라이브러리
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Next.js 프로젝트 생성 및 Claude/OpenAI 클라이언트 구성

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/claude.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/openai.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/types.ts`

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → 에러 없음

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/claude.ts", "src/lib/openai.ts", "src/lib/types.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["next dev runs", "claude client importable", "openai embedding returns number[]"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Style Engine — Crawler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** URL을 받아 HTML/CSS 추출 및 스크린샷 Supabase Storage 저장

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/style-engine/crawler.ts`

**Verify:** `curl -X POST /api/templates/analyze -d '{"url":"https://example.com"}'` → screenshotUrl 반환

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/style-engine/crawler.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/templates/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"url\":\"https://example.com\",\"name\":\"test\"}'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["crawlUrl returns html+css+screenshotUrl", "CrawlError thrown for invalid URL", "screenshot saved to supabase storage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Style Engine — Analyzer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HTML/CSS를 Claude로 분석해서 StyleProfile JSON 추출

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/style-engine/analyzer.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/style-engine/analyzer.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/style-engine/analyzer.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/style-engine/analyzer.ts", "src/lib/style-engine/analyzer.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/style-engine/analyzer.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["returns StyleProfile", "colors.primary is hex", "cssSnippets has header/hero/card/footer", "AnalysisError on invalid JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Style Engine — Vector Store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** StyleProfile를 임베딩해서 Supabase pgvector에 저장 및 유사 검색

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/style-engine/vector-store.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/style-engine/vector-store.test.ts`
- Create: `supabase/migrations/002_match_templates.sql`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/style-engine/vector-store.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/style-engine/vector-store.ts", "supabase/migrations/002_match_templates.sql"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/style-engine/vector-store.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["saveTemplate inserts with embedding", "searchSimilarTemplates returns TOP 3"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Style Engine — API 라우트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** URL/HTML POST → 크롤→분석→저장 전체 파이프라인 API

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/api/templates/analyze/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/templates/route.ts`

**Verify:** POST /api/templates/analyze → { templateId, thumbnailUrl }

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/templates/analyze/route.ts", "src/app/api/templates/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/templates/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"url\":\"https://example.com\",\"name\":\"test\"}'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST with url returns templateId", "POST with html returns templateId", "GET returns template list", "missing fields return 400"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Generation Engine — HTML Generator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 프롬프트 + 템플릿으로 완성된 HTML 파일 생성

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/generation-engine/html-generator.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/generation-engine/html-generator.test.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/generate/html/route.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/generation-engine/html-generator.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/generation-engine/html-generator.ts", "src/app/api/generate/html/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/generation-engine/html-generator.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HTML starts with DOCTYPE", "nav includes all menu items", "retry feedback improves result"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Generation Engine — Screenshot
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HTML → Browserless → PNG URL (Supabase Storage)

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/generation-engine/screenshot.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/generate/screenshot/route.ts`

**Verify:** POST /api/generate/screenshot → { screenshotUrl: '...png' }

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/generation-engine/screenshot.ts", "src/app/api/generate/screenshot/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/generate/screenshot -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"pageId\":\"test\"}'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["returns PNG url", "ScreenshotError on browserless failure", "url ends with .png"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: 관리자 UI — 템플릿 관리
tasks.description:
**Goal:** URL 업로드→분석→목록 관리하는 관리자 UI

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/admin/TemplateUploader.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/admin/TemplateCard.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/(admin)/admin/templates/page.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/(admin)/admin/templates/new/page.tsx`

**Verify:** http://localhost:3000/admin/templates/new → 전체 플로우 동작

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/admin/TemplateUploader.tsx", "src/components/admin/TemplateCard.tsx", "src/app/(admin)/admin/templates/page.tsx", "src/app/(admin)/admin/templates/new/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx next dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loading state on analyze", "new card after analysis", "thumbnail and keywords visible"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: 사용자 Wizard UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 템플릿선택→메뉴설정→프롬프트→시안확인→다운로드 Wizard

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/user/TemplateSelector.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/user/MenuBuilder.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/user/PromptInput.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/user/PagePreview.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/user/WizardLayout.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/(user)/projects/new/page.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/api/projects/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/projects/[id]/pages/route.ts`

**Verify:** http://localhost:3000/projects/new → Wizard 전체 흐름 완주

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/user/", "src/app/(user)/projects/", "src/app/api/projects/"], "verifyCommand": "npx next dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["step progression visible", "template grid loads", "menu add/remove works", "prompt hints clickable", "preview shows PNG"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: ZIP 다운로드 + 완료 화면
tasks.description:
**Goal:** approved 페이지 전체를 ZIP으로 다운로드

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/api/projects/[id]/download/route.ts`

**Verify:** GET /api/projects/[id]/download → application/zip 응답

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/projects/[id]/download/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl -O http://localhost:3000/api/projects/TEST_ID/download", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Content-Type: application/zip", "filenames based on page names", "only approved pages included"]}
```
